name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages, state, votes

(* --specification TwoPhaseCommit

  (* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
  sendPrepare() == 
    /\ coordinator.state = "Init"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender : "Coordinator", receiver : "Participant", type : "Prepare"])
    /\ coordinator.state' = "WaitingForVotes"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  (* Participant receives Prepare and votes *)
  receivePrepare(i) == 
    /\ messages = <<>>
    /\ participants[i].state = "Init"
    /\ messages' = <<[sender : "Participant", receiver : "Coordinator", type : "VoteYes"]>>
    /\ participants[i].state' = "VotedYes"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  (* Coordinator receives VoteYes from all participants *)
  receiveVoteYes(i) == 
    /\ messages = <<>>
    /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
    /\ messages' = <<[sender : "Participant", receiver : "Coordinator", type : "VoteYes"]>>
    /\ coordinator.votes' = Append(coordinator.votes, "Yes")
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  (* Coordinator decides to commit *)
  decideCommit() == 
    /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
    /\ Len(coordinator.votes) = N
    /\ ALL i \in 1..N : coordinator.votes[i] = "Yes"
    /\ messages' = <<[sender : "Coordinator", receiver : "Participant", type : "Commit"]>>
    /\ coordinator.state' = "Committed"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  (* Coordinator decides to abort *)
  decideAbort() == 
    /\ coordinator.state = "WaitingForVotes"
    /\ Len(coordinator.votes) = N
    /\ EXISTS i \in 1..N : coordinator.votes[i] = "No"
    /\ messages' = <<[sender : "Coordinator", receiver : "Participant", type : "Abort"]>>
    /\ coordinator.state' = "Aborted"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  (* Participant receives Commit *)
  receiveCommit(i) == 
    /\ messages = <<>>
    /\ participants[i].state = "VotedYes"
    /\ messages' = <<[sender : "Participant", receiver : "Coordinator", type : "Commit"]>>
    /\ participants[i].state' = "Committed"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  (* Participant receives Abort *)
  receiveAbort(i) == 
    /\ messages = <<>>
    /\ participants[i].state = "VotedYes"
    /\ messages' = <<[sender : "Participant", receiver : "Coordinator", type : "Abort"]>>
    /\ participants[i].state' = "Aborted"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  (* Coordinator receives Commit from all participants *)
  receiveCommitFromAll() == 
    /\ messages = <<>>
    /\ coordinator.state = "Committed"
    /\ ALL i \in 1..N : participants[i].state = "Committed"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  (* Coordinator receives Abort from all participants *)
  receiveAbortFromAll() == 
    /\ messages = <<>>
    /\ coordinator.state = "Aborted"
    /\ ALL i \in 1..N : participants[i].state = "Aborted"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  (* Next action *)
  Next == 
    \/ sendPrepare()
    \/ receivePrepare(i) \in 1..N
    \/ receiveVoteYes(i) \in 1..N
    \/ decideCommit()
    \/ decideAbort()
    \/ receiveCommit(i) \in 1..N
    \/ receiveAbort(i) \in 1..N
    \/ receiveCommitFromAll()
    \/ receiveAbortFromAll()
end specification *)

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : /\ flag[i] = FALSE
                    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max([num[j] | j \in 1..N]) + 1]
                    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ size \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Producer == /\ size < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
           /\ votedFor' = NULL
           /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, FiniteSet, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ Values \in FiniteSet

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepted, chosen, chosenBy, chosenBallot, chosenByBallot, chosenBallotBy

Ballot == [p \in proposers, n \in Nat |-> [p |-> p, n |-> n]]
HighestBallot == [p \in proposers, n \in Nat |-> [p |-> p, n |-> n]]
\* Ballot ordering: higher n wins; if equal, higher p wins
BallotGt == [p1 \in proposers, n1 \in Nat, p2 \in proposers, n2 \in Nat |-> 
              (n1 > n2) \/ ((n1 = n2) /\ (p1 > p2))]

\* Initial state
Init == /\ acceptors = {1, 2, 3}
       /\ proposers = {1, 2}
       /\ promises = [a \in acceptors |-> [b \in Ballot |-> [v \in Nat |-> 0]]]
       /\ accepted = [a \in acceptors |-> [b \in Ballot |-> [v \in Nat |-> 0]]]
       /\ chosen = {}
       /\ chosenBy = [v \in Nat |-> 0]
       /\ chosenBallot = [v \in Nat |-> [b \in Ballot |-> 0]]
       /\ chosenByBallot = [p \in proposers |-> 0]
       /\ chosenBallotBy = [v \in Nat |-> 0]

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, LOSS_PROB
VARIABLES ackedChunks, chunks, file, lostChunks, retransCount, sentChunks

(* Helper definitions *)
chunkSize == CHUNK_SIZE
fileSize == FILE_SIZE
maxRetries == MAX_RETRIES

(* Define the initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>  (* file is initially empty *)
    /\ chunks = <<>>  (* no chunks to send *)
    /\ sentChunks = {}  (* no chunks have been sent *)
    /\ ackedChunks = {}  (* no chunks have been acknowledged *)
    /\ retransCount = [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 0]  (* no retransmissions yet *)
    /\ lostChunks = {}  (* no chunks have been lost *)

(* Define the next-state relation *)
Next ==
    (* Simulate file arrival *)
    /\ file = <<>>  (* file is initially empty *)
    /\ chunks = <<>>  (* no chunks to send *)
    /\ sentChunks = {}  (* no chunks have been sent *)
    /\ ackedChunks = {}  (* no chunks have been acknowledged *)
    /\ retransCount = [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 0]  (* no retransmissions yet *)
    /\ lostChunks = {}  (* no chunks have been lost *)

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = 0

Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = clocks[i] + 1
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = clocks[i] + (i \in 1..N : 1)  \* Drift modelled as integer offset
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = (1/N) * \Sum j \in 1..N : clocks[j]  \* Average-based sync

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 1
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 2
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 1
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Pages

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients :
            /\ c \in free
            /\ free' = free \ {c}
            /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients :
            /\ c \in Pages
            /\ c \in allocated
            /\ free' = free \cup {c}
            /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \in SUBSET Pages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {1, 2}
        /\ wants \in {1, 2} \cup {1, 2} \cup {1, 2} \cup {1, 2}
        /\ wants[1] = 0
        /\ wants[2] = 0
        /\ wants[3] = 0
        /\ wants[4] = 0

Next == \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ wants[2] = 0
          /\ wants[3] = 0
          /\ wants[4] = 0
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1, ![2] = 0, ![3] = 0, ![4] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn = 2
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ wants[2] = 0
          /\ wants[3] = 0
          /\ wants[4] = 0
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0, ![2] = 1, ![3] = 0, ![4] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants[1] = 1
          /\ wants[2] = 0
          /\ wants[3] = 0
          /\ wants[4] = 0
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0, ![2] = 1, ![3] = 0, ![4] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn = 2
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ wants[2] = 1
          /\ wants[3] = 0
          /\ wants[4] = 0
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0, ![2] = 0, ![3] = 1, ![4] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ wants[2] = 1
          /\ wants[3] = 0
          /\ wants[4] = 0
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0, ![2] = 0, ![3] = 1, ![4] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn = 2
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ wants[2] = 0
          /\ wants[3] = 1
          /\ wants[4] = 0
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0, ![2] = 0, ![3] = 0, ![4] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ wants[2] = 0
          /\ wants[3] = 1
          /\ wants[4] = 0
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0, ![2] = 0, ![3] = 0, ![4] = 1]
        \/ /\ turn = 2
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ wants[2] = 0
          /\ wants[3] = 0
          /\ wants[4] = 1
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0, ![2] = 0, ![3] = 0, ![4] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ wants[2] = 0
          /\ wants[3] = 0
          /\ wants[4] = 1
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0, ![2] = 0, ![3] = 0, ![4] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn = 2
          /\ wants[1] = 0
          /\ wants[2] = 0
          /\ wants[3] = 0
          /\ wants[4] = 0
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0, ![2] = 0, ![3] = 0, ![4] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
